SEARCH
Package org.praxisplatform.uischema.rest.response

Class RestApiResponseTimeSeriesStatsResponse

java.lang.Object
org.praxisplatform.uischema.rest.response.RestApiResponse<TimeSeriesStatsResponse>
org.praxisplatform.uischema.rest.response.RestApiResponseTimeSeriesStatsResponse
public class RestApiResponseTimeSeriesStatsResponse extends RestApiResponse<TimeSeriesStatsResponse>
Envelope concreto de OpenAPI para respostas de time-series stats.

A classe materializa o tipo generico RestApiResponse<TimeSeriesStatsResponse> para que as ferramentas de documentacao publiquem corretamente essa superficie estatistica.
